standard: Eden ERP Page / Flow Delivery Contract

risks.dateTime: Backend contract parses ISO timestamp fields before repository use.
risks.uuid: UUID identifiers are validated by frontend schema and Pydantic model.
risks.enum: Canonical values are stored separately from Turkish labels.
risks.rawDict: Payload shape is pinned by shared contract references.

risks.dateTime: base_updated_at is normalized as datetime at contract boundary.
risks.uuid: Company and person identifiers reject empty strings.
risks.enum: Person kind uses canonical value set.
risks.rawDict: Contract schema covers the create payload keys.

risks.dateTime: Operation service stores normalized datetime payloads.
risks.uuid: Route and scope identifiers are validated by payload contract.
risks.enum: Authority transactions use canonical enum values.
risks.rawDict: Operation payload registry validates by operation_type.

risks.enum: Partner type uses canonical value mapping.
risks.rawDict: Partner payload is represented by a Zod and Pydantic contract.

risks.dateTime: Decision and effective dates are separate from audit timestamps.
risks.uuid: Ownership target identifiers are UUID checked.
risks.enum: Operation type maps to canonical payload schema.
risks.rawDict: Operation request payload is typed by operation_type.

risks.dateTime: Opening and closing dates stay date-only.
risks.uuid: Company identifier is required and UUID checked.
Document and entity identifiers are UUID checked.
risks.rawDict: Multipart metadata is bounded by contract schema.

risks.dateTime: Employment dates are separate from audit timestamps.
risks.uuid: Person and employee identifiers are UUID checked.

risks.dateTime: Theme updates use ISO datetime metadata.
risks.uuid: Tenant identifier is optional for local development storage.
risks.enum: Theme status is limited to draft, inactive and active in the form.
risks.rawDict: Theme JSON import is validated by schema before activation.

risks.dateTime: Operation timestamps are normalized by payload registry.
risks.enum: Operation type selects a registered payload model.
risks.rawDict: Raw payload is rejected when operation_type is unmapped.
